## Handoff
- Phase complete: UI-only KDS mock implemented.
- Done so far: Added `/kds` as an admin-only full-screen Inertia route and built a mock Vue KDS optimized around the Samsung Galaxy Tab A11+ 16:10 landscape target. KDS backend writes, migrations, enum changes, live Echo adapter, POS changes, and sibling app changes remain explicitly out of scope.
- Exact next action: Perform manual Samsung Galaxy Tab A11+ landscape validation on the physical device.
- Working-tree state (list edited files explicitly; cross-check with `git status`): Pre-existing unrelated `README.md` modification is present and must not be touched or staged for this case.
- Risks / do-not-redo: Do not implement KDS backend state writes. Do not add recall enum edges. Do not create POS void controls. Keep this slice UI-only.

## Tier
2

## Branch
dev

## Problem

Kitchen needs an early visual KDS surface for a Samsung Galaxy Tab A11+ target before production feed/write integration is ready.

## Contrarian Review

This should not start the full KDS backend. The stable, lowest-risk slice is a mock-only, full-screen Nexus UI route that proves the wall-screen layout, touch ergonomics, filters, timers, and card interactions without touching order contracts.

## Success Criterion

Task is done when `/kds` renders a full-screen mock KDS Inertia page, client-side interactions match the approved UI-only plan, frontend checks pass, and the Nexus pre-merge gate is attempted/reported.

## Investigation

- Existing Nexus frontend is Laravel/Inertia/Vue 3 with shadcn-vue components under `resources/js/components/ui`.
- `resources/js/app.ts` resolves pages from `resources/js/pages/**/*.vue`, so a page component at `resources/js/pages/KDS/Display.vue` is enough for `Inertia::render('KDS/Display')`.
- Root contracts reserve backend/live-feed KDS integration for later; this slice must avoid API and WebSocket changes.

## Root Cause

No KDS UI route/page exists yet.

## Proposed Fix

Add an authenticated admin `/kds` route and a mock-only Vue KDS display with local ticket data and interactions.

## Files Changed

- `woosoo-nexus/routes/web.php`
- `woosoo-nexus/tests/Feature/Admin/KdsDisplayTest.php`
- `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/pages/KDS/Display.vue`
- `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/components/KDS/KdsCommandBar.vue`
- `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/components/KDS/KdsFilterChips.vue`
- `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/components/KDS/KdsTicketCard.vue`
- `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/components/KDS/KdsEmptyState.vue`
- `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/components/KDS/kdsTypes.ts`
- `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/components/KDS/kdsHelpers.ts`
- `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/components/KDS/kdsMockData.ts`
- `docs/cases/nex-case-016-kds-ui-only.md`

## Verification

- Committed: `6293bd2` Kitchen Display ui mockup (2026-06-07 re-verify: 3 tests / 15 assertions PASS).
- Red test first: `php artisan test tests\Feature\Admin\KdsDisplayTest.php --compact` failed with 3 failures because `/kds` did not exist yet.
- Targeted test after implementation: `php artisan test tests\Feature\Admin\KdsDisplayTest.php --compact` passed, 3 tests / 15 assertions.
- `npm.cmd run typecheck` passed.
- `npm.cmd run lint:check` passed.
- `npm.cmd run build` passed.
- Final gate passed: `.\scripts\pre-merge-check.ps1 -App woosoo-nexus` ended with `pre-merge-check OK (woosoo-nexus)`.
- Manual physical Samsung Galaxy Tab A11+ landscape validation was not run in this desktop environment.

## Executioner Verdict

APPROVED.

## Remaining Risks

- Real Samsung Galaxy Tab A11+ browser testing is still required outside this desktop environment.
- Backend/live feed integration remains deferred by design.
- Commit `6293bd2` includes `README.md` changes though case scope excluded it — review separately if unintended.
